case_title: BLANCA ESELA CASTILLO PULIDO VS. OIL CHANGER, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PULIDO, BLANCA ESELA CASTILLO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,345.66 FILED BY PULIDO, BLANCA ESELA CASTILLO AS TO DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS 506. PLAINTIFF BLANCA ESELA CASTILLO PULIDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TONY CAMPBELL, CUSTOMER SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PULIDO, BLANCA ESELA CASTILLO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC. $2,698.28 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,698.28, FOR EXPENSES INCURRED AFTER DEFENDANT SERVICED PLAINTIFF & USED INCORRECT TRANSMISSION FLUID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
